channel.title: Project on Brocoli's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Project on Brocoli's Blog

item.title: AICompiler
item.description: Torch2Tensor 2023.3~2023.5 Torch nn.Module -> TVM Tensor program Github: https://github.com/qiaolian9/Torch2Tensor A easy tool for generating Tensor Program from Torch(besd on Torch FX & TVM Relax) Pruner 2023.5~2024.1 Key: Deep Learning Compiler, Tensor Optimization Pruner: An Efficient Cross-Platform Tensor Compiler with Dual Awareness URL:https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.02361 Github: https://github.com/qiaolian9/Pruner Tensor program optimization on Deep Learning Accelerators (DLAs) is critical for efficient model deployment. Although search-based Deep Learning Compilers (DLCs) have achieved significant performance gains compared to manual methods, they still suffer from the persistent challenges of low search efficiency and poor cross-platform adaptability. In this paper, we propose Pruner, following hardware/software co-design principles to hierarchically boost tensor program optimization. Pruner comprises two primary components: a Parameterized Static Analyzer (PSA) and a Pattern-aware Cost Model (PaCM). The former serves as a hardware-aware and formulaic performance analysis tool, guiding the pruning of the search space, while

item.title: LLM Infer
item.description: LLMs Inference LLMs for real-time chatting on your own Devices To do list: several LLMs; several Inference framwork(focus on quant strategies, infer efficiency, infer acc). webUI etc. Demo: ChatGLM3-6B in Nvidia Jetson Orin AGX(sm87)

item.title: MedSeg
item.description: FcTC-UNet 2021.11~2022.2 Fine-grained Combination of Transformer and CNN for Thoracic Organs Segmentation (accepted in EMBC22) URL: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/9870880 PI-CAI 2022 Challenge URL: http://rumc-gcorg-p-public.s3.amazonaws.com/evaluation-supplementary/642/3057dc31-3a85-480f-8c6b-0da7d1327c48/Swangeese.pdf Github: https://github.com/Yukiya-Umimi/ITUNet-for-PICAI-2022-Challenge
